violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must enroll a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Application left with site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
Basins at the 3 bay sink behind the bar (1st basin) and in the kitchen (2nd basin) were observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in the refrigerator and 3 bay sink in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The condensate from the ice machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The wall by the rear door is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2024
